summary: SERVICES OS Layer testing complete. All core features working: Request Builder modal, pet selection, service request creation (POST /api/os/services/request), Services inbox display, Ticket detail panel with timeline, Cancel action, and /api/orders GET endpoint (legacy bug fix verified). Mobile viewport also tested and working correctly.

integration_issues.flow: Ticket detail panel status update after cancel
integration_issues.issue: After clicking Cancel Request, the ticket status in the detail panel UI still shows 'Placed' instead of 'Cancelled'. The backend updates correctly (confirmed via console log), but the frontend panel doesn't reflect the new status immediately.

action_items: Consider refreshing ticket data in TicketDetailPanel after cancel action completes to show updated status
critical_code_review_comments: ServicesPanel.jsx: Clean implementation with proper memoization (memo) for sub-components
ServiceRequestBuilder.jsx: Correct use of data-testid attributes for testing
services_routes.py: Complete UNIFIED SERVICE PIPELINE implementation (Steps 1-7)
orders_routes.py: GET /api/orders endpoint properly returns orders list

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All core flows working, minor status refresh issue in detail panel

seed_data_creation: Multiple test tickets created via automation (TEST_Grooming_*, TEST_ActionTest_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SERVICES OS Layer is fully functional. Test flow: Login -> Navigate to /mira-demo -> Click SERVICES tab -> Click launcher (e.g., Grooming) -> Select pet -> Submit Request -> View ticket in inbox -> Click ticket to see detail panel -> Cancel action works. All backend APIs under /api/os/services/ are working. Console logs show [SERVICES] for debugging.

request_builder_modal.description: Opens from service launcher tap (Grooming, Training, etc.)

pet_selection.description: Pet chips are selectable, shows all user's pets

service_request_creation.description: POST /api/os/services/request creates ticket with full pipeline (Admin notify, Member notify, Pillar request, Channel intake)

services_inbox.description: Tickets appear in inbox under Active Requests with correct grouping

ticket_detail_panel.description: Shows ticket details, timeline, and action buttons

orders_get_endpoint.description: GET /api/orders returns orders list (legacy bug fix verified)

mobile_viewport.description: Services panel works correctly on mobile (390x844 viewport)

api_verification.GET /api/os/services/inbox: PASS - Returns grouped tickets (awaiting_user, active, orders, completed)
api_verification.POST /api/os/services/request: PASS - Creates ticket with full pipeline
api_verification.GET /api/os/services/ticket/{id}: PASS - Returns ticket detail with timeline
api_verification.GET /api/orders: PASS - Returns orders list (405 bug fix confirmed)
